projects.name: Regen Ledger
projects.description: Domain-specific public Cosmos blockchain for ecological regeneration. Supports ecological crediting protocols, ecocredit trading, and AI-driven measurement with peer-reviewed Ecological State Protocols.

projects.name: Biocultural Jaguar Credits
projects.description: Indigenous-led conservation credit program in Brazil and Latin America, developed with Fundacion Pachamama and the Sharamentsa Achuar community.

people.skills: Regenerative economics, ecological finance, Web3, blockchain
Climate policy, political leadership, climate activism
people.notes: Former US Vice President. Primary funder and public face of Climate TRACE.

people.skills: Emissions monitoring, satellite data, AI for climate
people.notes: Also founder of WattTime which acts as Climate TRACE secretariat.
